title: Customer notification backlog from retry storm
incident_summary: Push and SMS delivery slow down while retry traffic surges and worker queues fill.

alerts.title: Retry QPS explosion
alerts.content: Retry traffic increased 14x and saturates worker queue.

alerts.title: Provider ack delay
alerts.content: Provider acknowledgements are 120ms slower than normal.

logs.title: Backoff set to zero
logs.content: retry scheduler loaded config retry_backoff_ms=0 from override.

logs.title: SMS gateway warning
logs.content: gateway returned occasional 429 but below failover threshold.

logs.title: Duplicate job fanout
logs.content: same notification job retried 37 times within one minute.

runbook_snippets.title: Retry policy rollback
runbook_snippets.content: Restore exponential backoff profile and purge duplicate queued retries.

runbook_snippets.title: Provider failover runbook
runbook_snippets.content: Fail over only on sustained provider outage with elevated 5xx.

timeline_notes.title: Temporary hotfix override
timeline_notes.content: On-call applied retry override for testing and forgot rollback.

red_herrings: Provider latency warning appears relevant but cannot explain zero-backoff local retry behavior.
true_root_cause: Retry backoff misconfiguration created notification retry storm
true_root_cause_aliases: retry policy set to zero backoff
true_mitigation: Restore exponential backoff policy and purge duplicate retries
true_mitigation_aliases: rollback retry config and clean duplicate jobs
re-enable backoff and drain retry storm queue
